content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.90% breaking below 24000, India VIX +7.7% to 18.14 signals risk-off. PSU Bank -1.89%, Realty -2.38%, Energy -1.35% all bleeding; only IT (+0.23%) and Pharma (+0.64%) green. Defensive rotation underway — pharma/FMCG/diagnostics holding up while cyclicals get hit. Holdings are net positive (+₹4.5K unrealized) with strong winners (COFORGE +9.7%, LAURUSLABS +3.7%, MARICO +3.3%). Focus: trail SLs on winners to lock gains; selective adds in pharma/FMCG only.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23845,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF at -1.2%, CMP 123.60 vs SL 121.00 (~2.1% buffer). VIX surge + Middle East tensions supportive of gold. Hold thesis intact; SL respects normal noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 835.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +3.3% at ₹847, SL already at ₹835 (breakeven+) per Rule (a). CMP-SL gap = 1.4% which is above the 1% trail-gap floor. SL stays put — no-op MODIFY → HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Largest winner +9.7% at ₹1383. Current SL 1360 sits 1.7% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. Trail to ₹1340 to lock ~6.4% gain while preserving room for normal IT volatility (gap-up day, expect retrace). 1340 vs 1383 CMP = 3.1% gap, comfortable. Q4 was strong (+30% YoY rev, +134% PAT), brokerage upgrades to 1900-2020 keep upside open. Wait — checking rule: current SL 1360 is TIGHTER than proposed 1340. Cannot LOOSEN SL. Reverting to HOLD at SL 1360."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: current SL 1360 is ALREADY tight (1.7% below CMP 1383). Tightening further would violate the 1% trail-gap floor and risk same-session forced exit on normal noise. Hold SL at 1360 — locks +8% gain, lets the breakout run toward 1500 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5% at ₹2799, SL 2740 (~2.1% below). FY26 PAT +47% strong, but chemicals peers under pressure today (SUMICHEM, TATACHEM -6%). Thesis intact, SL respects volatility."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3% at ₹9068, SL 8950 (~1.3% below). At fresh 52w high after results, brokerage upgrades to 10500. P&L not yet at +2% to trigger trail. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5% at ₹10600, SL 10440 (~1.5% below). Q4 strong, buyback at ₹12000 provides floor. Auto sector -1.24% today but BAJAJ-AUTO flat — relative strength. SL respects noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.7% at ₹478, SL 470 (~1.7% below). Q4 PAT +16%, FY27 guidance upgraded to low-double-digit. Bullish research modifier +0.07. Thesis intact; SL absorbs noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.7% at ₹1270. Current SL 1255 vs CMP 1270 = 1.2% gap, already locking gains. No change needed — equals current SL/target. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL 1255 already at +2.4% from entry 1226 — gain locked. CMP 1270 → gap 1.2%, within trail discipline. Hold for upside toward 1320 (52w-high breakout, FY26 PAT +148%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.7% at ₹1257, SL 1198 (~4.7% below). Just entered today on Q4 beat at 52w-high breakout. P&L not yet at +2% to trigger trail. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3% at ₹862, SL 850 (~1.5% below). Order book +61% YoY, sector tailwind. SL respects noise; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1% at ₹8081 near 52w high, SL 7950 (~1.6% below). Q4 May 20 board meeting — binary in ~7 sessions, outside the 3-session danger window. HSBC TP 9000. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1% at ₹1872, SL 1830 (~2.2% below). Q4 board mid-May — need to monitor. Pharma sector leadership today (+2.03%). NEUTRAL research modifier (-0.05) on Halol OAI overhang, but technical setup near 52w high. Hold; will reassess if catalyst date confirms in 3-session window."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4% at ₹1647, SL 1610 (~2.3% below). Q4 PAT -15% YoY a concern (NEUTRAL modifier -0.05), peers like Metropolis/Thyrocare outperforming. Diagnostics sector momentum supportive but stock-specific weakness. Holding to SL; if breaks, exit cleanly."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 121, CMP 123.60, 2.1% buffer. Gold safe-haven bid intact."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 835 already locks +1.8% gain; CMP-gap 1.4% within trail discipline."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1360 locks +8% gain; CMP-gap 1.7%. Tightening further would self-stopout."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 2740, 2.1% below CMP. Chemicals weak today but FY26 PAT +47% supports."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 8950, 1.3% below. 52w-high; brokerage targets to 10500."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 10440, 1.5% below CMP. Buyback at 12000 provides floor."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 470, 1.7% below. Q4 beat + guidance upgrade."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1255 locks +2.4%; CMP-gap 1.2%, within trail discipline."},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fresh entry today, SL 1198 wide enough for new position."},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 850, 1.5% below CMP. Order book momentum intact."},
    {"symbol": "APOLLOHOSP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 7950, 1.6% below. Q4 May 20 outside 3-session window."},
    {"symbol": "SUNPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1830, 2.2% below. Pharma defensive bid; monitor Q4 date."},
    {"symbol": "LALPATHLAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1610, 2.3% below. Allow SL to do its job if Q4 weakness extends."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Rule 18 audit — qualifying BULLISH research candidates not admitted today, with explicit per-name reasons:\n- LAURUSLABS (+0.12): already held, full position.\n- MCX (+0.10): F&O regulatory overhang, P/E 81-102x, EBITDA margin 74.8% likely peak — reject on extended valuation at 52w high post +291% PAT print.\n- COFORGE (+0.09): already held, largest winner.\n- GOLDBEES, CGPOWER, DABUR, MARICO, POLYCAB, SRF, BAJAJ-AUTO, APOLLOHOSP: all already held.\n- UPL (NEUTRAL 0.00): board meeting + Capital Markets Day TODAY = binary event within 0 sessions, Rule 11 disqualifies new entry.\n- TATACONSUM: pending BUY order already OPEN @ 1240 (LIMIT, 420min old) — also already filled new lot; do not stack.\n- INFY, HCLTECH, KOTAKBANK, THERMAX, NIFTYBEES, TORNTPHARM, BIOCON: no qualifying BULLISH research with +0.05 modifier in this batch; tape too late at 14:12 with VIX spiking to fire fresh swing entries.\nDeployment at 52% is below soft 80% target, but VIX +7.7%, Nifty breaking 24000, and a 5-day win-rate of 12% with profit factor 0.3x argue strongly for capital preservation over fresh admits. Today's job is trail-and-defend, not chase.\n\nCANCEL recommendation: BUY 20x TATACONSUM CNC LIMIT @ 1240 — order is 420 minutes old, CMP is 1250-1257 well above limit, and TATACONSUM position already filled today via separate fill (40 qty avg 1248). Stale duplicate; should be cancelled but no CANCEL action in schema — flagging for next cycle.\nSimilarly HFCL LIMIT @ 133.50 MIS order is 7765 min old (multi-day stale) — should be cancelled.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 22 / 5-day stats brutal: 12% win-rate, profit factor 0.3x, net -₹32K. Today realized -₹28K (likely earlier exit fills). Unrealized +₹4.5K offsetting partially. 13 CNC holdings is at the high end — diversification is real but management bandwidth is stretched.\n\nKey discipline check: VIX +7.7% to 18.14 on a -0.9% Nifty day is a regime signal — risk OFF. Defensive rotation already in book (pharma SUNPHARMA/LAURUSLABS, FMCG MARICO/DABUR/TATACONSUM, healthcare APOLLOHOSP/LALPATHLAB, gold GOLDBEES). No fresh additions warranted with 1h 17m to close on a high-VIX session.\n\nWinners to protect: COFORGE +9.7% (SL 1360 locking +8%), LAURUSLABS +3.7% (SL 1255 locking +2.4%), MARICO +3.3% (SL 835 locking +1.8%). These are the bright spots — let them run, don't self-stopout with over-tight trails.\n\nLosers respecting SL: BAJAJ-AUTO -1.5%, DABUR -1.7%, LALPATHLAB -1.4% — all within risk budget, let SLs work if they trip.\n\nDaily loss budget: ₹49K remaining of ₹73K — substantial buffer, no panic-exit pressure."
}
